title: CommonsV2 NPC hover UX + display names

log.context: CommonsV2 NPC hover UX + display names

Everything is live. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**Changes made to `/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/`:**

**1. NPC names hidden by default, show on mouseover (`renderer.ts`)**
- `drawNPC` now takes `mouseX`/`mouseY` parameters
- Hover is detected using the same `NPC_HIT_RADIUS = 14` hitbox as the click handler
- Name label is only drawn when `hovered == true`, with a rounded pill background instead of a bare text shadow

**2. Cursor feedback on NPC hover (`main.ts`)**
